title: Line Following Robot
description: We built the robot in a competition powered by Accenture. We worked in groups of three to complete our robot within 12 hours. 🕗

title: Empty Bins
description: How long would it take to save millions of trees  ~ 2 days, we say, that’s how long it took us to create our solution within the framework of the annual Hackathon.🌳

title: Zoo Targu Mures
description: We created a mobile application for the Zoo in Targu Mures. 🦁

title: One TV
description: I contributed to the development of the One TV VOD software, which is a streaming platform that offers a wide range of movies and TV shows.
